name: rival_involvement
description: Rival tracking and encounter mechanics (Core Rules pp.85-86, 91, 119). Roll 1D6; if <= number of Rivals, one tracks you down.

rival_check.description: Roll 1D6. If the result is equal to or lower than the number of Rivals, one has tracked you down. Select exact Rival at random.

modifiers.description: Add +1 to the roll for every crew member sent as Decoy (makes it harder for rivals to find you).

rival_check.consequences: Prevents doing your chosen battle. Quests/Rumors remain, but Patron jobs expire on schedule.

rival_attack_types.description: Rival Attack Type table (Core Rules p.91). If tracked down via crew task, always a Showdown.

entries.description: Deploy one fewer crew than standard. Cannot Seize the Initiative.
Add 1 additional enemy. Crew must set up in/adjacent to building. Fail to Hold = lose 1D3 credits.
Fail to Hold the Field = ship takes 1D6+1 Hull Point damage.

special_rules: If tracked down via crew task, always a Showdown.
No Win condition vs Rivals, but Holding the Field = increased chance of removing them.
Fleeing before 4 rounds: Random crew member loses random equipment.

post_battle_rival_resolution.description: Resolve rival status after battle (Core Rules p.119).

new_rival_check.description: Non-Rival opponent, Held the Field: Roll 1D6. On a 1, they become your Rivals (noted for this planet).

remove_rival_check.description: Existing Rival, Held the Field: Roll 1D6. Add +1 if you Tracked them down. Add +1 if you killed a Unique Individual. On 4+, remove from Rivals list.
